text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I notice an intense energy emanating
from a certain corner of the gym.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... C'mon, glutes! Don't fail me now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan's pushing her muscles to the limit... I
find myself cheering her on purely because of how
fierce her drive is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Pheeew! YEEEAH! I hit my goal!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ack! Sorry for all the yelling.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I'm just stoked my muscles were able to
do even more reps than yesterday.
choice_data_list: Why stop there? Push yourself to the limit!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you have a point. I hit my goal, but that
was just some arbitrary number I chose...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Maybe my muscles wanna keep going! Yeeeah,
let's gooo! Time to do more reps!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan proceeds to do as many squats as
she possibly can!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Phew, it feels amazing to push myself! Check out
my quads! They're so happy, they're shaking!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for telling me to push myself to my limits.
I would've gone home with gas still left in my tank
if you hadn't.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: All right, biceps, triceps, it's your turn! Show me whatcha got!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I love weight training because the results don't
lie. All you gotta do is knuckle down and train,
and you're sure to reap the rewards.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I did more reps today than yesterday, and I'll be
able to do even more tomorrow! The growth is
tangible.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, listen to me blabbering on! All right, I've
gotta do some shoulder presses next! Gains wait
for no one!
